name: Modulo
description: Cross-chain DeFi wallet. One vault, every chain.

home.description: Portfolio overview, token list, action buttons, earn card

receive.description: Receive crypto sheet — address card, QR code, network pills, exchange buttons

swap.description: Swap screen — pay/receive cards, percentage pills, keypad, CTA

swap-select.description: Token selection sheet — search field, token list with balances

send.description: Send sheet — search field, recent contacts list

explore.description: Explore/search — favourites cards, chain filters, top tokens list

sharedComponents.name: status-bar
sharedComponents.description: iOS status bar — time, signal, wifi, battery

sharedComponents.name: bottom-nav
sharedComponents.description: 4-button nav bar — home, search, activity, swap (purple circle)

sharedComponents.name: pill
sharedComponents.description: Network/chain filter pill — 37.5px, full radius, icon + label

order: 1. Extract shared components from Figma (depth 5+) for each component in sharedComponents
2. Generate shared.css with all tokens + verified component specs
3. Download all icon/asset SVGs from Figma using mcp__figma__download_figma_images
6. Push for Frank to run visual QA
rules: Every screen imports shared.css — no duplicate token definitions
Shared components use classes from shared.css — never redefine inline
All assets downloaded from Figma — never approximated or hand-drawn
Verify SVG content after download — check it renders the intended shape
Drill to depth 5+ for component extraction — depth 3 misses leaf nodes
Screen-specific styles only in the screen's <style> block
